nodes.name: 云雾森林
nodes.summary: 云雾森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联206种鸟类，包括Black guan、Red-faced guan、紫冠雉等206种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 常綠森林
nodes.summary: 常綠森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联442种鸟类，包括紫冠雉、角冠雉、Razor-billed curassow等442种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Northern barred woodcreeper
nodes.summary: Northern barred woodcreeper（Northern barred woodcreeper，学名 Dendrocolaptes sanctithomae），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联4个分布地点节点，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 马格达莱纳河
nodes.summary: 马格达莱纳河是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联31种鸟类，包括黑颈冠叫鸭、藍嘴鳳冠雉、Chestnut-winged chachalaca等31种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Gallery forest
nodes.summary: Gallery forest是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联206种鸟类，包括Blue-throated piping guan、White-throated piping guan、黑額鳴冠雉等206种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: punctipectus, northern Colombia from the valley of the Magdalena River east into northwestern Venezuela (Note that the map excludes this subspecies' range.) The northern barred woodcreeper primarily inhabits humid tall evergreen forest

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: punctipectus, northern Colombia from the valley of the Magdalena River east into northwestern Venezuela (Note that the map excludes this subspecies' range.) The northern barred woodcreeper primarily inhabits humid tall evergreen forest

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It also occurs in less tall forest, gallery forest, semi-deciduous forest, and mangroves, and even less frequently in cloudforest and pine-oak woodlands

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It also occurs in less tall forest, gallery forest, semi-deciduous forest, and mangroves, and even less frequently in cloudforest and pine-oak woodlands

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The "eastern" barred woodcreeper is "[p]robably among the most threatened of all dendrocolaptids as a result of extensive habitat destruction within its highly restricted, lowland range"
